string 2: Can I leave it to you to procure the fruit of Karpos Hulē for me?

I shall remain here and continue to try and find a way to
treat Merukimon while keeping an eye on his condition.
As soon as I learn anything new, I'll let you know.
All right. Got it! We'll head straight for the Gear Forest, then.
Aegiomon, look!
The forest... It's all dead!
This is terrible!
What happened to everyone who was here?
Where's Bacchusmon? And Sirenmon?
Let's head to the village!
Where did everyone go...?
Bacchusmon, Sirenmon... Where are you?
There really is no one here... Please don't tell me...
The only place left to check is the sanctuary...
I hope everyone is okay...
Bacchusmon!
We're so glad you're okay!
"Okay"...?
What part of this looks "okay" to you?
Everyone's gone, except for yours truly. And it's all my fault.
*hiccup*
What... happened here...?

I thought I could stand up to the Titans. I figured I was
practically invincible, now that I've given up the booze.
Maybe that's why I let my guard down.
When they attacked... I was asleep—the very worst possible time!

After all the years of drinking, I guess I still had some
alcohol left in my system...
When I awoke, this is how I found things... I was... Too late...
Too late to help... Too late to do anything...
Th-That's not true! There's still time! You can still...!
That's where you're wrong...
The one thing I don't have... is time.
It should be taking effect any minute now.
This bad boy here.
Is that... poison?!
Why would you do that?!
It's time for me to face the facts...
I couldn't protect anything...

And without anything left to protect... booze is just tasteless,
no matter what I drink...
A party's not a party... without anyone to party with.
And if I can't even enjoy drinking...
...what else is left for me?
Nothing. That's what...
Bacchusmon!
It's that dark shadow again...!
Are we going to time travel again...?{next}
It's the Abyss Area all over again! And that must mean...

The appearance of the dark shadow proves that the death of
that Digimon was a turning point in history.

Perhaps they were to become an apostle of Iliad. One fit to
become part of the vessel to hold the Sacred Current.

The screening of the Akashic Vision is about to begin. Please
make your way into the theater.
Bacchusmon, the chief of a village surrounded by a primordial forest.
This mighty Digimon loves his drink...

...and lived a happy life along with song aficionado Sirenmon and
the many other carefree villagers.

Titan attempts to claim the forest's Current were always
repelled by Bacchusmon's great strength.
And each win was celebrated with lots of revelry among friends.
Yet such triumphant toasts left many a Digimon drunk and vulnerable.

The Titans worked meticulously, crafting a plan to take down the
powerful Bacchusmon.
The victory parties had become routine. But one day...

...a Titan assassin took advantage of Bacchusmon's
intoxication, and put all the villagers to sleep.

The intense Titan assault that followed led to the deaths
of Sirenmon and a great number of the other villagers.
The once verdant forest had withered into a shadow of its former beauty.

Bacchusmon, overcome by grief and guilt, took a bottle of poison
to his own lips...

...and extinguished the joyful sounds of exuberant merrymaking
forevermore...
